PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('unless')
    PsiWhiteSpace('        ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_START)('"semana\"\\\"ge fcontext -l | grep -E \"^')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('pathname')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_MIDDLE)(' = ')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('destination')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_END)('$\"\\"')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING)('"\""')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING)('"\\"')
